paragraphs: This notice summarizes a routine administrative adjustment intended to keep scheduling and records practices consistent across the office.
Teams should continue using the existing process unless a section below identifies a specific change in timing, routing, or documentation.
The update is procedural in nature and does not alter the general scope of services already communicated to staff or participants.
Supervisors are responsible for sharing the notice with affected personnel and confirming that local copies of standard forms are current.
Questions should be directed through the usual administrative contact so that responses can be documented and shared consistently.
The policy language below is meant to be concise and should be read together with existing office guidance materials.
